series_metadata.series_title: Ohio Turnpike and Infrastructure Commission Bond Files
series_metadata.series_description: This series consists of documents related to ODOT Bond financing and project files relating to OTIC bonds. Includes--vouchers, project spenddowns, invoices, nexus applications federal authorization, funding agreements and PS&E bid documents.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 3 Years After Final Maturity is Matured, Retired or Defeased. ; Electronic: 3 Years After Final Maturity is Matured, Retired or Defeased., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase
